main.name: Pankeel Shah
main.title: Software Engineer
main.description: I build scalable software and delightful user experiences.
main.bio2: I'm a software engineer who loves crafting full-stack products, from intuitive frontends to robust backend services. I've shipped production code at Fortune 500 companies, built side projects that tens of thousands of people use, and I'm always hunting for the next interesting problem to solve.
main.bio3: Outside of work you'll find me watching films, hitting the gym, or cooking up something new. Always happy to connect. Feel free to reach out!
main.contactMessage: Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or simply want to say hi, my inbox is always open.

education.description: Relevant coursework: Algorithms & Data Structures, User Interface Design, Internet Programming, Intro to AI, Computer Vision, Database Systems, Software Engineering, Operating Systems, Animation & Game Planning, Discrete Structures.

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Modernized barcode store procedures by developing Spring Boot and Kotlin microservices
Deployed a Praxis UI enabling generation and interpretation of random-weight barcodes
Engineered unit and integration tests using Spock and Groovy to verify application functionality

work.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Worked in a Verification Testing Scrum team, automating tests with .NET and Selenium for the CareLink Network
Designed human-readable acceptance tests using SpecFlow
Raised and tracked issues, collaborating with developers to satisfy website requirements
